title: narration.transcript.json — timed narration segments for sync
description: The downstream timing AUTHORITY: the Composition Engineer prefers a scene's narration segment span over the script's duration_est_sec, and offsets captions off it. Segment start/end are GLOBAL (cumulative across the whole video), tagged with scene_no. Cadence builds these deterministically from per-scene tts durations (no ASR). An OPTIONAL per-segment `words[]` (additive; populated only when whisper.cpp word-level enrichment is available) is documented here but stays optional so the deterministic per-scene transcript validates unchanged; additionalProperties stays true.

words.description: additive (optional): word-level timings for finer caption sync, folded in only when whisper.cpp transcribe enrichment is available. Each word's time is GLOBAL, like its segment.
